rag_rules: Assume and guarantee statements must be placed in component type scopes, not implementations
References in AGREE contracts must resolve to visible identifiers or declared helpers
AGREE expressions must have valid types; invalid references or missing declarations cause type errors
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics indicate scope or reference issues that require architectural alignment
AGREE contracts should only reference visible AADL features or locally declared helpers
Repair actions must preserve existing architecture while fixing contract violations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in annex agree blocks
Component type scopes are required for assumptions and guarantees
Helper declarations must have valid scalar types: int, real, bool
anti_patterns: Adding assume/guarantee statements in component implementations instead of types
Referencing undeclared or non-visible identifiers in AGREE expressions
Introducing package-qualified names not present in the model
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
